completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
completionGate.grandfatheredNote: Reference precedent; not an execution target.

sanitation.publicFindingPolicy: Unremediated findings of any severity keep detailed report text, affected paths, exploit analysis, validation notes, and proposed patches outside the public branch until fixes land atomically.

lanePolicy.mechanism: partition findings by file-ownership into non-overlapping parallel lanes; serialize overlapping ones

phases.name: bootstrap
phases.exit: Packet scaffolded on @slop/june-8-2026; manifest/index/triage stubs valid.

phases.name: extract
phases.exit: All 52 findings captured (Report + Patch) to /tmp; sanitized markdown + patches committed; capturedCount == 52. Current partial capture: 12/52.

phases.name: triage
phases.exit: Every finding has a disposition + verdict + lane; lanes partition all 52; INDEX summaries reconcile.

phases.name: approval-gate
phases.exit: Human approves the disposition matrix. STOP until approved; meta.gateApprovedAt set.

phases.name: close-invalids
phases.exit: Chrome pass 1: every non-remediate disposition closed in Codex with its reason.

phases.name: lane-partition
phases.exit: Conflict graph colored; lanes + serializedChains recorded; each remediate finding assigned a lane.

phases.name: remediate-by-lane
phases.exit: Every remediate finding fixed; targeted verification recorded in triage.json (changedFiles + verificationCommand).

phases.name: yeet-to-mergeable
phases.exit: bun run beep yeet green; PR open and mergeable; Greptile 5/5; 0 unresolved review threads.

phases.name: close-remediated
phases.exit: Chrome pass 2: all remediated findings marked 'Already fixed' with PR evidence; all 52 closed.

phases.name: closeout
phases.exit: INDEX/manifest/triage reconciled; history evidence written; packet status updated.

stopConditions: Post-triage GATE: disposition matrix is not yet human-approved.
A finding would be set to 'Won't fix' without explicit written justification.
Sanitization scan finds a signed URL, token, auth header, cookie, or secret path in tracked files.
Enumerated Codex finding count does not equal 52.
Required source files are missing or materially contradictory.
The same blocker repeats after reasonable investigation.
